title: target_style_output
description: Output of TargetLLMStyleMode. Supports different structural forms depending on the target model.

output_type.description: The structural form of the adapted prompt.

target_style_source.description: How target_style was determined: stated by user, auto-detected from idioms, or defaulted to generic.

target_model.description: Optional. Specific model identifier (e.g., 'o1', 'claude-opus-4') for sub-profile logic.

content.description: The adapted prompt content. Structure depends on output_type.

system_message.description: Present when output_type is 'message_bundle'. Contains role, context, rules.

user_message.description: Present when output_type is 'message_bundle'. Contains the task.

x-hard_rules: output_type must be 'message_bundle' when target_style is 'gpt' and target_model is not o1/o3
output_type must be 'xml_prompt' when target_style is 'claude' and the prompt mixes role with task
output_type must be 'single_prompt' for o1/o3 (no system message support)
semantic content (goal, constraints, output_format) must be identical to the input structured_prompt
target_style_source is always required — never omit
